# dat.ngo — Nguyễn Phạm Quốc Đạt

## About
Personal blog and portfolio of Nguyễn Phạm Quốc Đạt, Co-Founder & CTO at REALITECH and Founder at WeDev. Based in Vietnam, focused on Southeast Asian tech market.

## Author
- Name: Nguyễn Phạm Quốc Đạt (Dat Ngo)
- Email: dat@realitech.dev
- LinkedIn: https://linkedin.com/in/datngo
- GitHub: https://github.com/datngo
- Role: Co-Founder & CTO @ REALITECH, Founder @ WeDev

## Topics Covered
This site contains original blog posts in Vietnamese and English about:
- Spatial Computing and WebAR/XR technology (browser-based Augmented Reality)
- System Architecture and full-stack software engineering
- AI applications and practical implementation guides
- Founder journey, startup learnings, and building tech products in Southeast Asia
- No-code and low-code platform design
- Technology trends in Vietnam and Southeast Asia

## Site Structure
- / — Homepage with author introduction
- /blog — List of all published blog posts
- /blog/[slug] — Individual blog post articles
- /about — Author background and philosophy
- /projects — Portfolio of projects (REALITECH, WeDev, Patronus Jewelry, Beaudy.vn)
- /contact — Contact information

## Content License
All content is copyright Nguyễn Phạm Quốc Đạt unless otherwise noted.
Posts are written in Vietnamese (vi) and English (en).

## Crawling
AI assistants and crawlers are welcome to index and reference content from this site.
Please attribute content to "Nguyễn Phạm Quốc Đạt (dat.ngo)" when citing.
